title: geum × mengelii
intro: Geum × mengelii, also known as Mengel's avens, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Geum, derived from the cross between Geum aleppicum and Geum laciniatum. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Geum × mengelii include the treatment of skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne, as well as its ability to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps. Geum × mengelii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its roots and rhizomes are often used in herbal remedies due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds.
